title: When two or more containers are started at the same time, the latter always fails
body:
When two or more containers are started at the same time, the latter always fails, because dangling file in /var/lib/cni/networks/podman prevents container starting.

====================podman info
host:
  BuildahVersion: 1.12.0-dev
  CgroupVersion: v1
  Conmon:
    package: conmon-2.0.6-1.module_el8.2.0+305+5e198a41.x86_64
    path: /usr/bin/conmon
    version: 'conmon version 2.0.6, commit: a2b11288060ebd7abd20e0b4eb1a834bbf0aec3e'
  Distribution:
    distribution: '"centos"'
    version: "8"
  MemFree: 9451700224
  MemTotal: 16513523712
  OCIRuntime:
    name: runc
    package: runc-1.0.0-65.rc10.module_el8.2.0+305+5e198a41.x86_64
    path: /usr/bin/runc
    version: 'runc version spec: 1.0.1-dev'
  SwapFree: 8409575424
  SwapTotal: 8409575424
  arch: amd64
  cpus: 2
  eventlogger: journald
  hostname: server1
  kernel: 4.18.0-193.6.3.el8_2.x86_64
  os: linux
  rootless: false
  uptime: 1h 15m 18.15s (Approximately 0.04 days)
registries:
  blocked: null
  insecure: null
  search:
  - registry.access.redhat.com
  - registry.redhat.io
  - docker.io
store:
  ConfigFile: /etc/containers/storage.conf
  ContainerStore:
    number: 2
  GraphDriverName: overlay
  GraphOptions: {}
  GraphRoot: /var/lib/containers/storage
  GraphStatus:
    Backing Filesystem: xfs
    Native Overlay Diff: "true"
    Supports d_type: "true"
    Using metacopy: "false"
  ImageStore:
    number: 6
  RunRoot: /var/run/containers/storage
  VolumePath: /var/lib/containers/storage/volumes
======end

         : x86_64

That is long since fixed. Podman 1.9.3 in RHEL/Cent 8.2.1 probably has the
patch to fix it; Podman 2.0.5 as will ship in RHEL/Cent 8.3.0 will
definitely have it.

###Run error
```shell
[root@server-dev system]# /usr/bin/podman start -a nexus
ERRO[0000] Error adding network: failed to allocate for range 0: 10.88.0.87 has been allocated to 341bbb722e62955e1a84003026e5db62c67765becd81eb6e92b8b8d55ae636d6, duplicate allocation is not allowed 
ERRO[0000] Error while adding pod to CNI network "podman": failed to allocate for range 0: 10.88.0.87 has been allocated to 341bbb722e62955e1a84003026e5db62c67765becd81eb6e92b8b8d55ae636d6, duplicate allocation is not allowed 
Error: unable to start container 341bbb722e62955e1a84003026e5db62c67765becd81eb6e92b8b8d55ae636d6: error configuring network namespace for container 341bbb722e62955e1a84003026e5db62c67765becd81eb6e92b8b8d55ae636d6: failed to allocate for range 0: 10.88.0.87 has been allocated to 341bbb722e62955e1a84003026e5db62c67765becd81eb6e92b8b8d55ae636d6, duplicate allocation is not allowed
```
